name: macos-mcp-server
description: Control macOS system settings, apps, windows, audio, displays, screenshots, and Focus mode via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

interface.shortDescription: Control macOS system settings, apps, windows, audio, displays, screenshots, and Focus mode via MCP.
interface.longDescription: MCP server for controlling macOS — system settings, application and window management, audio, displays, screenshots, and Focus mode. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.
